violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper boats by the Nacho cheese dispenser in the large concession stand were not inverted. Paper and plastic boats by the nacho dispenser in the third floor concession stand were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Both hand wash sinks in the large concession stand were blocked by a trash cans.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink in the main kitchen was not working.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee and volunteer coats and possessions were stored on the shelves by the door of the large concession stand stand with single service items.
